items.title: The Leggy 100: An annual ranking of the best players in the NFL draft class
items.body_text: Jeff Legwold reveals his list of top NFL draft prospects for 2026, which is based purely on talent. Who is No. 1 on this year's Leggy 100?
items.author: Jeff Legwold

items.title: Kiper's favorites: 15 players who will outperform their draft slot
items.body_text: Mel Kiper Jr.'s annual list of NFL draft favorites includes two speedy receivers, three undersized cornerbacks.
items.author: Mel Kiper Jr.

items.title: Sources: Giants trade Lawrence for Bengals pick
items.body_text: The Giants are trading defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence to the Bengals in a deal for the No. 10 pick in next week's NFL draft, sources told ESPN.
items.author: Ben Baby

items.title: Source: Titans using 5th-year option on Skoronski
items.body_text: The Tennessee Titans are exercising the fifth-year option for right guard Peter Skoronski, a source told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler on Saturday.
items.author: Turron Davenport

items.title: Source: Texans, Anderson agree to $150M deal
items.body_text: Texans and All-Pro defensive end Will Anderson Jr. have agreed to a historic three-year, $150 million extension to make him the highest-paid non-quarterback, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter.
items.author: DJ Bien-Aime

items.title: Sources: Brissett not at Cards' offseason program
items.body_text: Cardinals incumbent starting quarterback Jacoby Brissett has not been in attendance for the start of the team's offseason program as he waits for a new deal, sources told NFL Network.
items.author: Josh Weinfuss

items.title: WR Flowers: Harbaugh's practices led to injuries
items.body_text: Ravens wideout Zay Flowers says "heavy" practices under former coach John Harbaugh were the reason Baltimore "had a lot of injuries" last season.
items.author: Jamison Hensley

items.title: Falcons trade DT Orhorhoro for Jags DT Smith
items.body_text: The Falcons have traded DT Ruke Orhorhoro to the Jaguars for DT Maason Smith. Both players were selected in the second round of the 2024 draft.
items.author: Michael Dirocco

items.title: Report: Penix, Njoku among targets used in fraud
items.body_text: A former Alabama defensive end is accused of using wigs and fake IDs to impersonate NFL players to secure nearly $20 million in fraudulent loans, with a report identifying Michael Penix Jr., David Njoku and Xavier McKinney as the targeted players.
items.author: Michael Rothstein

items.title: Chargers GM shuts down Johnston trade rumors
items.body_text: Chargers general manager Joe Hortiz shut down trade rumors surrounding wide receiver Quentin Johnston on Thursday.
items.author: Kris Rhim

items.title: ⬆ Players who have boosted their draft stock
items.body_text: Dillon Thieneman and Monroe Freeling have drastically boosted their stock since the start of last season. Who else has climbed the board?
items.author: Jeff Legwold

items.title: How all 32 teams can crush the NFL draft
items.body_text: Ben Solak hits the top priorities for every single team -- and the prospects who can meet those needs.
items.author: Ben Solak

items.title: The fallout of a stunning Dexter Lawrence trade: Four takeaways on the NFL draft, the Bengals, more
items.body_text: The Giants traded Lawrence to the Bengals for the No. 10 pick in the draft. What does that say about the NFL's trade market, this draft class and the state of the Bengals?
items.author: Bill Barnwell

items.title: How did the Bengals, Giants do in the Dexter Lawrence II trade?
items.body_text: We're handing out report cards on big moves, including the Giants trading Dexter Lawrence II to the Bengals.

items.title: Why Jimmy Johnson cautions Jets that making right picks more valuable than stockpiling them
items.body_text: With eight picks in the first and second rounds, New York sits where the former Cowboys coach was 35 years ago.

items.title: Forget the 40: The true measure of Carnell Tate
items.body_text: Wide receiver Carnell Tate is confident, intelligent and ready to star in the NFL. His mother made sure of it.

items.title: Inside the fallout of the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel photos
items.body_text: How Dianna Russini and New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel scrambled to respond to photos published in the New York Post.
items.author: Ben Strauss

items.title: Who won the Jaguars-Browns draft-day trade for Travis Hunter?
items.body_text: The Browns and Jags swapped picks in 2025 so Jacksonville could draft Hunter. Now, Cleveland has an extra first-rounder in 2026.
items.author: Daniel Oyefusi and Michael DiRocco

items.title: How a 'big argument' and lucky draft moves led to the Chiefs selecting Chris Jones
items.body_text: A look back 10 years later at the selection of Jones, one of the most important picks in franchise history.

items.title: Out with the old, in with the new: Ravens unveil new uniforms
items.body_text: The Ravens revamped their on-field look since 1999 with new uniforms after a process that took three years.

items.body_text: Washington's updated three-uniform set is headlined by the black "Hail Raiser" look with a new alternate logo.

items.title: Super Bowl 2027 on ESPN: Date, location, venue, more details
items.body_text: The 2027 Super Bowl will air on ESPN for the first time in network history. Learn more information about Super Bowl LXI festivities now.
